trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: "Vraska sees the grandeur in death but misses the hilarity." — Judith [Scryfall]. Two named Ravnica characters in one line: Vraska (Gorgon Planeswalker, assassin-guild figure with ties to the Golgari) and Judith (Rakdos Scourge Diva, legendary RNA-185). Judith's framing positions Rakdos violence as a critique of Golgari death-gravitas: Vraska has aesthetic reverence for death; Judith thinks that's missing the point. The pun in the card title is intentional [Scryfall].

Get the Point is a Dimir/Rakdos instant — Destroy target creature, Scry 1 — at common rarity in RNA. The Spectacle backdrop of Rakdos performances makes instant-speed removal doubly legible: this is an act, and the victim is the act [Scryfall]. Pauper-legal. EDHREC rank 24,960.

Artist Steve Argyle, known for distinctive figure-rendering and dynamic compositional choices in Magic card art. The overhead-view pinned-figure composition is unusual and striking for a common-slot removal spell; the starburst projectile pattern creates a radial symmetry that plays against the horror of the subject matter [Scryfall].
